titleStmt.title: SII 15.15: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 15. (B.K. No. 9 of 1930-31.) IṄGAḶĒŚVAR, BAGEVĀDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall (left of entrance) of the Nārāyaṇadēva temple.
This is dated the 12th regnal year of the king, Piṅgaḷa, Bhādrapada ba. 8, Thursday, Madhyāshṭamī, corresponding to 1137 A.D., September 9.

It registers a gift of gold by One Hundred Mahājanas of Doṅkanakēri for feeding the Brāhmaṇas. It also records a similar gift by Sēnabōva Mayilaṇa. The interest accruing from the amount was to be utilised for the said purpose.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmaccālukya sa¨rvvajñacakrava¨rti
bhūlōkamallava¨rṣada 12 neya piṁṅgaḷa saṁvatsarada bhādrapada ba 8 briha
spativāra vyatīpātaṁ madhyāṣṭamiyalu doṁkanakēriya nū¨rvvaruṁ mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ
tamma dha¨rmmavāga brāhmaṇabhōjanakkendu biṭṭa kaṭakaṁ gadyā 9 Ā kēriya ma
hābaḻayyana ma¨rmmaṁ sēnabōva mayilaṇaṁgaḷu biṭṭa kaṭakaṁ gadyāṇa 7 gu
like 4 Antu gadyāṇa 12 guḷikke 9 muntaṇa siddhā¨rtthi saṁvatsarada bādrapada ba 8
miga savriddhikadiṁ gadyāṇa 27 ¨rkke poṁge vriddhiyalu koṭṭa vri
ddhiyaṁ paṁcapa¨rva� berasi brāhmaṇa¨rgge satramaṁ caṁdrā¨rkkaruḷḷannavaraṁ
nū¨rvaru mahājanaṁgaḻu naḍayisuvaru .
Digital edition of SII 15.15 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
